svg.aria-label: Microsoft Patch Tuesday 6 zero-days, Apple CVE-2026-20700 targeted attack, Ivanti EPMM mass exploit, SAP CVSS 9.9 SQL injection, ransomware $74B forecast
svg.title: 2026-02-14: MS Patch Tuesday 6 0-days, Apple + Ivanti + SAP, $74B ransomware forecast

g.text: 6 exploited zero-days : Win kernel + Office preview : OOB back-port needed
Apple iOS targeted exploit : Ivanti EPMM mass intrusion : SAP SQLi CVSS 9.9
Global ransomware damage forecast $74B : SMB payout rise : RaaS churn
